en.text: or ; apparently from H5398; (compare H5399) an unclean (acquatic) bird; probably the heron (perhaps from its blowing cry, or because the nightheron is meant ))

senses.gloss_en: or ; apparently from H5398; (compare H5399) an unclean (acquatic) bird; probably the heron (perhaps from its blowing cry, or because the nightheron is meant ))
